links.title: awesome-cve-poc
links.description: Curated list of CVE PoCs by [@qazbnm456](https://github.com/qazbnm456).

links.title: js-vuln-db
links.description: Collection of JavaScript engine CVEs with PoCs by [@tunz](https://github.com/tunz).

links.title: Some-PoC-oR-ExP
links.description: 各种漏洞poc、Exp的收集或编写 by [@coffeehb](https://github.com/coffeehb).

links.title: uxss-db
links.description: Collection of UXSS CVEs with PoCs by [@Metnew](https://github.com/Metnew).

links.title: Exploit Database
links.description: ultimate archive of Exploits, Shellcode, and Security Papers by [Offensive Security](https://www.offensive-security.com/).

links.title: A2SV
links.description: Auto Scanning to SSL Vulnerability by [@hahwul](https://github.com/hahwul).

links.title: prowler
links.description: Tool for AWS security assessment, auditing and hardening by [@Alfresco](https://github.com/Alfresco).

links.title: slurp
links.description: Evaluate the security of S3 buckets by [@hehnope](https://github.com/hehnope).

links.title: commix
links.description: Automated All-in-One OS command injection and exploitation tool by [@commixproject](https://github.com/commixproject).

links.title: Censys
links.description: Censys is a search engine that allows computer scientists to ask questions about the devices and networks that compose the Internet by [University of Michigan](https://umich.edu/).

links.title: FOCA
links.description: FOCA (Fingerprinting Organizations with Collected Archives) is a tool used mainly to find metadata and hidden information in the documents its scans by [ElevenPaths](https://www.elevenpaths.com/index.html).

links.title: gitrob
links.description: Reconnaissance tool for GitHub organizations by [@michenriksen](https://github.com/michenriksen).

links.title: GSIL
links.description: Github Sensitive Information Leakage（Github敏感信息泄露）by [@FeeiCN](https://github.com/FeeiCN).

links.title: NSFOCUS
links.description: THREAT INTELLIGENCE PORTAL by NSFOCUS GLOBAL.

links.title: raven
links.description: raven is a Linkedin information gathering tool that can be used by pentesters to gather information about an organization employees using Linkedin by [@0x09AL](https://github.com/0x09AL).

links.title: Shodan
links.description: Shodan is the world's first search engine for Internet-connected devices by [@shodanhq](https://twitter.com/shodanhq).

links.title: SpiderFoot
links.description: Open source footprinting and intelligence-gathering tool by [@binarypool](https://twitter.com/binarypool).

links.title: urlscan.io
links.description: Service which analyses websites and the resources they request by [@heipei](https://twitter.com/heipei).

links.title: xray
links.description: XRay is a tool for recon, mapping and OSINT gathering from public networks by [@evilsocket](https://github.com/evilsocket).

links.title: Databases - start.me
links.description: Various databases which you can use for your OSINT research by [@technisette](https://twitter.com/technisette).

links.title: peoplefindThor
links.description: the easy way to find people on Facebook by [postkassen](mailto:postkassen@oejvind.dk?subject=peoplefindthor.dk%20comments).

links.title: tinfoleak
links.description: The most complete open-source tool for Twitter intelligence analysis by [@vaguileradiaz](https://github.com/vaguileradiaz).

links.title: Photon
links.description: Incredibly fast crawler designed for OSINT by [@s0md3v](https://github.com/s0md3v).

links.title: espi0n/Dockerfiles
links.description: Dockerfiles for various OSINT tools by [@espi0n](https://github.com/espi0n).

links.title: Raccoon
links.description: High performance offensive security tool for reconnaissance and vulnerability scanning by [@evyatarmeged](https://github.com/evyatarmeged).

links.title: Social Mapper
links.description: Social Media Enumeration & Correlation Tool by Jacob Wilkin(Greenwolf) by [@SpiderLabs](https://github.com/SpiderLabs).

links.title: Marshall Extensions
links.description: OSINT and security extensions for the Marshall privacy browser, providing reconnaissance and security-testing plugins by [@bad-antics](https://github.com/bad-antics).

links.title: OpenBuckets
links.description: Search engine for misconfigured public cloud storage buckets across any provider.

links.title: OSINT Projects
links.description: Free web toolkit for WHOIS/RDAP, DNS, IP geolocation, SSL certificate inspection and Certificate Transparency subdomain discovery.

links.title: Certificate Search
links.description: Enter an Identity (Domain Name, Organization Name, etc), a Certificate Fingerprint (SHA-1 or SHA-256) or a crt.sh ID to search certificate(s) by [@crtsh](https://github.com/crtsh).

links.title: Certificate Transparency
links.description: Google's Certificate Transparency project fixes several structural flaws in the SSL certificate system by [@google](https://github.com/google).

links.title: domain_analyzer
links.description: Analyze the security of any domain by finding all the information possible by [@eldraco](https://github.com/eldraco).

links.title: EyeWitness
links.description: EyeWitness is designed to take screenshots of websites, provide some server header info, and identify default credentials if possible by [@ChrisTruncer](https://github.com/ChrisTruncer).

links.title: subDomainsBrute
links.description: A simple and fast sub domain brute tool for pentesters by [@lijiejie](https://github.com/lijiejie).

links.title: Sublist3r
links.description: Sublist3r is a multi-threaded sub-domain enumeration tool for penetration testers by [@aboul3la](https://github.com/aboul3la).

links.title: charsetinspect
links.description: Script that inspects multi-byte character sets looking for characters with specific user-defined properties by [@hack-all-the-things](https://github.com/hack-all-the-things).

links.title: IPObfuscator
links.description: Simple tool to convert the IP to a DWORD IP by [@OsandaMalith](https://github.com/OsandaMalith).

links.title: FuzzDB
links.description: Dictionary of attack patterns and primitives for black-box application fault injection and resource discovery.

links.title: dirhunt
links.description: Web crawler optimized for searching and analyzing the directory structure of a site by [@nekmo](https://github.com/Nekmo).

links.title: ssltest
links.description: Online service that performs a deep analysis of the configuration of any SSL web server on the public internet. Provided by [Qualys SSL Labs](https://www.ssllabs.com).

links.title: wayparam
links.description: Cross-platform Python CLI that fetches historical URLs from the Wayback CDX API and outputs normalized parameterized URLs for fuzzing, by [@aleff-github](https://github.com/aleff-github).

links.title: JoomlaScan
links.description: Free software to find the components installed in Joomla CMS, built out of the ashes of Joomscan by [@drego85](https://github.com/drego85).

links.title: wpscan
links.description: WPScan is a black box WordPress vulnerability scanner by [@wpscanteam](https://github.com/wpscanteam).

links.title: WAScan
links.description: Is an open source web application security scanner that uses "black-box" method, created by [@m4ll0k](https://github.com/m4ll0k).

links.title: Nuclei
links.description: Nuclei is a fast tool for configurable targeted scanning based on templates offering massive extensibility and ease of use by [@projectdiscovery](https://github.com/projectdiscovery).

links.title: Vigolium
links.description: High-fidelity vulnerability scanner fusing agentic AI with native speed, modularity, and precision, maintained by [@j3ssie](https://github.com/j3ssie).

links.title: ZAP by Checkmarx
links.description: Open-source web application security scanner maintained by the ZAP Core Team.

links.title: Fray
links.description: Open-source WAF bypass and security-testing toolkit with 6,300+ payloads across OWASP categories, AI-assisted evasion engine, 27-check reconnaissance pipeline, and OWASP hardening audit, by [@dalisecurity](https://github.com/dalisecurity).

links.title: Trust Scan
links.description: URL security scanner combining threat intelligence (URLhaus, PhishTank, Spamhaus) with 40+ scam and phishing pattern detection by [@undeadlist](https://github.com/undeadlist).

links.title: ZeroTrust
links.description: Privacy-first Chrome extension that analyzes website security locally with on-device AI (WebGPU), producing trust scores from HTTPS, phishing, malicious-script, and cookie-compliance signals, by [@sattyamjjain](https://github.com/sattyamjjain).

links.title: SecuriTool
links.description: Free online collection of 29 client-side web security tools: web auditor, JWT attacker/decoder, CVE search, CSP evaluator, email security checker (SPF/DKIM/DMARC), subdomain scanner, and more. 100% client-side, privacy-first, open source by [@ReplikanteK](https://github.com/ReplikanteK).

links.title: Burp Suite
links.description: Burp Suite is an integrated platform for performing security testing of web applications by [portswigger](https://portswigger.net/).

links.title: Astra
links.description: Automated Security Testing For REST API's by [@flipkart-incubator](https://github.com/flipkart-incubator).

links.title: aws_pwn
links.description: A collection of AWS penetration testing junk by [@dagrz](https://github.com/dagrz).

links.title: TIDoS-Framework
links.description: A comprehensive web application audit framework to cover up everything from Reconnaissance and OSINT to Vulnerability Analysis by [@_tID](https://github.com/theInfectedDrake).

links.title: numasec
links.description: AI-driven penetration-testing platform that coordinates 10 agents and 38 vulnerability scanners covering OWASP Top 10, by [@FrancescoStabile](https://github.com/FrancescoStabile).

links.title: ARS3NAL
links.description: Offline-first, self-hosted pentest & bug-bounty arsenal - searchable payloads, a click-to-build command generator, GTFOBins, wordlists, an embedded CyberChef, reverse shells and per-vulnerability checklists, with a live static demo - by [@inflictx](https://github.com/inflictx).

links.title: Darkmoon
links.description: Open source autonomous AI penetration testing platform that orchestrates 80+ offensive tools via Markdown playbooks and MCP across web, cloud, Active Directory and Kubernetes, with an evidence trail per finding by [@ASCIT31](https://github.com/ASCIT31).

links.title: XSStrike
links.description: XSStrike is a program which can fuzz and bruteforce parameters for XSS. It can also detect and bypass WAFs by [@s0md3v](https://github.com/s0md3v).

links.title: beef
links.description: The Browser Exploitation Framework Project by [beefproject](https://beefproject.com).

links.title: JShell
links.description: Get a JavaScript shell with XSS by [@s0md3v](https://github.com/s0md3v).

links.title: csp evaluator
links.description: A tool for evaluating content-security-policies by [Csper](https://csper.io).

links.title: tplmap
links.description: Code and Server-Side Template Injection Detection and Exploitation Tool by [@epinna](https://github.com/epinna).

links.title: dtd-finder
links.description: List DTDs and generate XXE payloads using those local DTDs by [@GoSecure](https://github.com/GoSecure).

links.title: XSRFProbe
links.description: The Prime CSRF Audit & Exploitation Toolkit by [@0xInfection](https://github.com/0xinfection).

links.title: CSS-Keylogging
links.description: Chrome extension and Express server that exploits keylogging abilities of CSS by [@maxchehab](https://github.com/maxchehab).

links.title: DVCS-Pillage
links.description: Pillage web accessible GIT, HG and BZR repositories by [@evilpacket](https://github.com/evilpacket).

links.title: dvcs-ripper
links.description: Rip web accessible (distributed) version control systems: SVN/GIT/HG... by [@kost](https://github.com/kost).

links.title: gitleaks
links.description: Searches full repo history for secrets and keys by [@zricethezav](https://github.com/zricethezav).

links.title: GitMiner
links.description: Tool for advanced mining for content on Github by [@UnkL4b](https://github.com/UnkL4b).

links.title: HTTPLeaks
links.description: All possible ways, a website can leak HTTP requests by [@cure53](https://github.com/cure53).

links.title: snallygaster
links.description: Tool to scan for secret files on HTTP servers by [@hannob](https://github.com/hannob).

links.title: LinkFinder
links.description: Python script that finds endpoints in JavaScript files by [@GerbenJavado](https://github.com/GerbenJavado).

links.title: keyFinder
links.description: Chrome extension that passively scans web pages for leaked API keys, tokens, and credentials across 10 attack surfaces using 80+ detection patterns and Shannon-entropy analysis, by [@momenbasel](https://github.com/momenbasel).

links.title: bXSS
links.description: bXSS is a simple Blind XSS application adapted from [cure53.de/m](https://cure53.de/m) by [@LewisArdern](https://github.com/LewisArdern).

links.title: malware-jail
links.description: Sandbox for semi-automatic Javascript malware analysis, deobfuscation and payload extraction by [@HynekPetrak](https://github.com/HynekPetrak).

links.title: repo-supervisor
links.description: Scan your code for security misconfiguration, search for passwords and secrets.

links.title: retire.js
links.description: Scanner detecting the use of JavaScript libraries with known vulnerabilities by [@RetireJS](https://github.com/RetireJS).

links.title: OpenRASP
links.description: An open source RASP solution actively maintained by Baidu Inc. With context-aware detection algorithm the project achieved nearly no false positives. And less than 3% performance reduction is observed under heavy server load.

links.title: GuardRails
links.description: A GitHub App that provides security feedback in Pull Requests.

links.title: js-xss
links.description: Sanitize untrusted HTML (to prevent XSS) with a configuration specified by a Whitelist by [@leizongmin](https://github.com/leizongmin).

links.title: DOMPurify
links.description: DOM-only, super-fast, uber-tolerant XSS sanitizer for HTML, MathML and SVG by [Cure53](https://cure53.de/).

links.title: Csper
links.description: A set of tools for building/evaluating/monitoring content-security-policy to prevent/detect cross site scripting by [Csper](https://csper.io).

links.title: UUSEC WAF
links.description: An open-source web application firewall and API security gateway maintained by [UUCORP](https://github.com/Safe3/).

links.title: BunkerWeb
links.description: A next-generation open-source Web Application Firewall built on nginx, maintained by [Bunkerity](https://github.com/bunkerity).

links.title: FCaptcha
links.description: Self-hosted CAPTCHA with behavioral analysis, vision-AI agent detection, headless-browser fingerprinting, and SHA-256 proof-of-work, maintained by [WebDecoy](https://github.com/WebDecoy).

links.title: Pompelmi
links.description: In-process file-upload security middleware for Node.js that scans untrusted uploads before storage to detect malware, MIME spoofing, and risky archives, maintained by [pompelmi](https://github.com/pompelmi).

links.title: WebDecoy
links.description: Zero-configuration WordPress bot-detection plugin combining WebDriver detection, headless-browser fingerprinting, behavioral analysis, and SHA-256 proof-of-work, maintained by [WebDecoy](https://github.com/WebDecoy).

links.title: CrowdSec
links.description: Open-source collaborative IPS written in Go that analyzes visitor behavior and shares threat signals across a community of operators, maintained by [CrowdSec](https://github.com/crowdsecurity).

links.title: Laravel CSP Generator
links.description: Interactive Content Security Policy builder for Laravel that outputs ready-to-use PHP middleware with nonce support and violation reporting, by [@itxshakil](https://github.com/itxshakil).

links.title: Charles
links.description: HTTP proxy / HTTP monitor / Reverse Proxy that enables a developer to view all of the HTTP and SSL / HTTPS traffic between their machine and the Internet.

links.title: reverse-shell
links.description: Reverse Shell as a Service by [@lukechilds](https://github.com/lukechilds).

links.title: webshell
links.description: This is a webshell open source project by [@tennc](https://github.com/tennc).

links.title: Webshell-Sniper
links.description: Manage your website via terminal by [@WangYihang](https://github.com/WangYihang).

links.title: nano
links.description: Family of code golfed PHP shells by [@s0md3v](https://github.com/s0md3v).

links.title: PhpSploit
links.description: Full-featured C2 framework which silently persists on webserver via evil PHP oneliner by [@nil0x42](https://github.com/nil0x42).

links.title: Iaitō
links.description: Qt and C++ GUI for radare2 reverse engineering framework by [@hteso](https://github.com/hteso).

links.title: plasma
links.description: Plasma is an interactive disassembler for x86/ARM/MIPS by [@plasma-disassembler](https://github.com/plasma-disassembler).

links.title: radare2
links.description: Unix-like reverse engineering framework and commandline tools by [@radare](https://github.com/radare).

links.title: DNS Rebind Toolkit
links.description: DNS Rebind Toolkit is a frontend JavaScript framework for developing DNS Rebinding exploits against vulnerable hosts and services on a local area network (LAN) by [@brannondorsey](https://github.com/brannondorsey).

links.title: dref
links.description: DNS Rebinding Exploitation Framework. Dref does the heavy-lifting for DNS rebinding by [@mwrlabs](https://github.com/mwrlabs).

links.title: Singularity of Origin
links.description: It includes the necessary components to rebind the IP address of the attack server DNS name to the target machine's IP address and to serve attack payloads to exploit vulnerable software on the target machine by [@nccgroup](https://github.com/nccgroup).

links.title: Whonow DNS Server
links.description: A malicious DNS server for executing DNS Rebinding attacks on the fly by [@brannondorsey](https://github.com/brannondorsey).

links.title: CyberChef
links.description: The Cyber Swiss Army Knife - a web app for encryption, encoding, compression and data analysis - by [@GCHQ](https://github.com/gchq).

links.title: cefdebug
links.description: Minimal code to connect to a CEF debugger by [@taviso](https://github.com/taviso).

links.title: ntlm_challenger
